name: McConnell AFB
tagline: A KC-46 tanker hub in Wichita, the 'Air Capital of the World.'
_note: Air Force tanker base (Wichita, KS; Central time). CONUS full template (BAH MHA KS101 Wichita/McConnell AFB; RentCast/SchoolDigger work). 22nd Air Refueling Wing (KC-46A Pegasus); a primary KC-46 base. Medical: 22nd Medical Group clinic. Facts verified from official sources (mcconnell.af.mil, 22 MDG/TRICARE, DeCA/AAFES, Wikipedia for corroborated headline facts). Kansas is TRICARE West. Affordable. Medium-confidence flags: base coords (approx), off-base ZIP 67037 (Derby).

data.Setting: Affordable mid-size city, the 'Air Capital of the World'

sections.title: Mission & Identity
data: McConnell Air Force Base is a primary home of the KC-46A Pegasus tanker, flown by the 22nd Air Refueling Wing, keeping aircraft fueled around the globe.
It's in Wichita, the 'Air Capital of the World' and a center of the aviation industry, an affordable mid-size Kansas city with a family-friendly feel.

data.subtitle: Wichita is an affordable mid-size city. The main choice is which suburb fits your commute and schools, with on-base housing also available.
intro: Wichita's cost of living is low, so BAH stretches well, and the metro offers a range of suburbs and good schools. On-base housing is available; many also live off base nearby.
Where you live mostly comes down to commute and schools across Derby (closest to the base), Andover, Rose Hill, and the Wichita suburbs.

recommendations.advice: Derby and southeast Wichita sit near the base for a short commute.
Derby, Andover, and Rose Hill are popular with families for their schools.
On-base housing is available and convenient; weigh it against the affordable local market.
Wichita is affordable, so BAH tends to go far and many families buy.

sections.title: Gates & Access
data: Visitors without a DoD ID need a visitor pass and a REAL ID-compliant ID from the Visitor Control Center.
Gate hours and visitor requirements change, so confirm the current details on the official McConnell AFB site before you go.

sections.title: On-Base Housing
data: McConnell AFB has privatized on-base family housing across several neighborhoods.
Eligibility and availability vary by rank and family size, so start with the housing office for the current manager, options, and waitlists.

source.label: DoD 2026 BAH Rates, MHA KS101 (Wichita/McConnell AFB)

sections.title: Schools
data: There is no DoDEA district here; children attend the local civilian public schools. Derby, Andover, Rose Hill, and Wichita districts serve military families depending on where you live; Derby and Andover are well regarded.
Your assigned schools depend on your address, so confirm the district and campus for any neighborhood you are considering.

data.Care: Outpatient primary and some specialty care on base; inpatient, emergency, and complex care via the Wichita network

intro: Whether to rent or buy is the biggest money decision of most PCS moves, and Wichita's affordable market makes buying a real option for many families.
rent: Your tour is short (about two years or less) or your orders feel uncertain.
You want time to learn the metro before committing.
You'd rather not gamble on resale timing when you PCS out.
Your BAH comfortably covers rent in the areas you'd consider.
buy: You expect to be here three or more years.
You want to use your VA loan and build equity instead of paying rent.
The affordable Wichita market fits your budget for a home you like.
You've found a suburb and commute you're confident about.
data.bottom_line: There is no universal right answer, but Wichita's affordability makes buying worth a look for longer tours. Run your BAH against the rent and home prices above, weigh your tour length, and talk to a lender and an agent who work with military families before you commit.

intro: The first month at a new duty station is mostly logistics. Knocking these out early makes everything else easier.

steps.title: Line up temporary lodging
steps.text: Book on-base lodging or a short-term rental before you arrive. You can claim Temporary Lodging Expense (TLE) for a limited number of days while you house-hunt.

steps.title: In-process and update DEERS
steps.text: Report to your unit and finance, and make sure DEERS and ID cards are current for every family member so TRICARE and base access work.

steps.title: Start with the Housing Office
steps.text: Check on-base availability and get the office's read on Derby, Andover, and the Wichita suburbs before you sign anything.

steps.title: Register your vehicle and sort access
steps.text: Handle base access and Kansas vehicle registration, and learn the visitor-pass process for guests. Bring your registration and insurance.

steps.title: Enroll the kids in school
steps.text: Contact the gaining district (Derby, Andover, Rose Hill, or Wichita) early and bring records and immunizations.

steps.title: Set up healthcare
steps.text: Update your TRICARE enrollment so you can be seen at the 22nd Medical Group clinic or network providers.

data.a: It's a primary KC-46A Pegasus tanker base, home to the 22nd Air Refueling Wing, in Wichita, the 'Air Capital of the World.'
On-base housing is available; many live off base. Derby is closest; Derby, Andover, and Rose Hill are popular for schools; Wichita offers big-city amenities.
Yes. Wichita is an affordable mid-size city, so BAH stretches well.
McConnell is MHA KS101 (Wichita/McConnell AFB). Use the calculator above for your grade.
